prompt: Build a staking dApp where users can stake an ERC-20 token and earn rewards over time. Include the smart contract and a frontend to stake, unstake, and view rewards.
assertions: Staking contract has stake, withdraw, and getReward (or claimReward) functions
Reward calculation uses rewardPerToken stored pattern (not naive block-by-block)
ReentrancyGuard (nonReentrant) applied to stake and withdraw functions
Separate ERC-20 token contract exists for the staking token
Frontend page shows staking, unstaking, and rewards viewing
Uses SE-2 hooks (useScaffoldReadContract/useScaffoldWriteContract) for contract interaction
Proper Hardhat deploy script(s) exist in packages/hardhat/deploy/
Events emitted for stake, withdraw, and reward claim actions
updateReward modifier or equivalent pattern updates rewards before state changes
Contracts compile successfully with valid Solidity syntax
